args.message: Welcome! Feast your eyes on this beauty – a one-owner, meticulously maintained 2017 Nissan Altima SV that practically hums with reliability. With its plush interior, top-tier fuel efficiency, and a suite of modern conveniences, this sedan isn't just a car; it's your next adventure waiting to happen. Priced aggressively at $11,495, this Altima is ready to drive off the lot today!

It really feels like a much newer, more expensive car.

args.review_text: The seller said it was 'one-owner' but it was a rental car, and they didn't mention the transmission issues or oil consumption, which made me feel quite misled.
